handleV3AcrossMessage(address,uint256,ad.details: This will execute all calls encoded in the msg. The caller is responsible for making sure all tokens are drained from this contract by the end of the series of calls. If not, they can be stolen. A drainLeftoverTokens call can be included as a way to drain any remaining tokens from this contract.

params.message: abi encoded array of Call structs, containing a target, callData, and value for each call that the contract should make.

orderFinalised(uint256[2][],bytes).details: Please make sure to empty the contract of tokens after your call otherwise they can be taken by someone else.

outputFilled(bytes32,uint256,bytes).details: Please make sure to empty the contract of tokens after your call otherwise they can be taken by someone else.

drainLeftoverTokens(address,address).notice: External helper to drain remaining tokens. Can be called as an instruction to empty other tokens.

handleV3AcrossMessage(address,uint256,ad.notice: Entrypoint for the handler called by the SpokePool contract.

orderFinalised(uint256[2][],bytes).notice: Entrypoint for the catalyst handler if inputs are delivered.

outputFilled(bytes32,uint256,bytes).notice: Entrypoint for the catalyst handler if an output has been delivered.
